message:
fix(http2): validate GOAWAY/PUSH_PROMISE/DATA-on-stream-0 + harden PING (bd-2c9t)

RFC 7540 compliance hardening across all 3 HTTP/2 server paths:
- GOAWAY payload must be >= 8 bytes (§6.8)
- PUSH_PROMISE explicitly rejected with PROTOCOL_ERROR (§6.6)
- DATA on stream 0 rejected with PROTOCOL_ERROR (§6.1)
- PING validation in h2_fc_clamp_send now rejects invalid frames
  instead of silently ignoring them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
